title: Reference Mini Me Chibi Identity Poster AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Mini Me Chibi Identity Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image premium cartoon-realistic Mini Me character poster for reference portrait before premium Mini Me chibi poster transformation, preserving same person from the reference photo. Subject: same person from the reference photo is transformed into a premium chibi-style character with slightly oversized head, bright expressive eyes, confident mischievous smile, friendly charismatic personality, and stylish modern streetwear with clean jacket details, premium sneakers, and confident creator-entrepreneur vibe. Scene: Modern textured wall setting with the Mini Me character standing on the left and bold vertical name typography for NEXORA on the right. Composition: Fixed poster layout: character leans casually against the wall with folded arms and one leg bent on the left; NEXORA appears vertically on the right with matching personality trait panels beneath each letter. Signature Elements: Preserved reference mini me chibi identity poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-quality 3D cartoon-realistic character design with premium chibi proportions, clean streetwear details, creator/entrepreneur vibe, modern infographic panels, subtle icons, and elegant spacing. Color Palette: Fixed modern soft-neon creator palette, textured wall neutrals, clean colored panels, and premium sneaker/streetwear accents. Lighting: Soft polished studio lighting, gentle wall shadows, clear character highlights, readable text panels, and realistic 3D material detail. Typography: NEXORA appears in large bold block capital letters arranged vertically; N - Naturally Confident; E - Entrepreneurial; X - X-Factor Energy; O - Open Minded; R - Resilient; A - Ambitious appears as clean concise personality text under each matching letter. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
